name: Pull request
about: Submit changes to TPT Zenith
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Description

Brief summary of the change and the motivation behind it.

## Related issue

Closes #(issue number)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt` and `go fmt` applied
- [ ] `cargo clippy` / `go vet` pass
- [ ] `cargo build` / `go build` pass
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] SPDX headers present on new source files
- [ ] Dual license (MIT OR Apache-2.0) respected
